title: MemOutW Statement
parameters:
wordPortNum	Integer expression representing memory I/O words.

outputData	Specifies output data (integers from 0 to 65535) using an expression or numeric value.
description: Changes the current status of memory I/O output port group specified by the word port number to the specified output data.
see_also:
Simultaneously sets 16 memory bits.

MemIn

MemInW

MemOut

MemOutW Statement Example

MemOutW 0, 25
